name: /pr-corpus-update persists the consumed token count to the budget file outside dry-run mode per L-7 per-day tracking
command: printf '%s' '{}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --consumed-tokens 25000 --budget b.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'total_used_today=25000' out.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("b.json","utf8"));process.exit(j["cfpb-consumerfinance"].used_today===25000?0:1)' && echo persisted 1>&2
